title: CVE-2026-29022
summary: The dr_libs library version 0.14.4 and earlier contains a heap buffer overflow vulnerability in the drwav__read_smpl_to_metadata_obj() function, allowing attackers to exploit memory corruption via crafted WAV files. The vulnerability has been fixed in commit 8a7258c.

title: CVE-2024-55019
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb Web Version v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains an incorrect access control in the component download_wb.cgi, allowing unauthenticated attackers to download arbitrary files. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55024
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the authorization mechanism, allowing unauthorized attackers to perform Administrative actions using service accounts. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55023
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains a hardcoded encryption key, allowing attackers to access sensitive information. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55020
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb Web Version v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains a command injection vulnerability in the DHCP activation feature, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary commands with root privileges. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55022
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains an authenticated command injection vulnerability via the HMI Name parameter, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary commands. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55021
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains a hardcoded password in the FTP protocol, allowing attackers to access sensitive information. The vulnerability has been patched.

title: CVE-2024-55025
summary: The Weintek cMT-3072XH2 easyweb v2.1.53, OS v20231011 contains an incorrect access control in the VNC component, allowing unauthorized attackers to access the HMI system. The vulnerability has been patched.
